story_title: Ensure Accessibility Compliance for Pricing Features
description: Ensure that all new pricing features, including calculators and alerts, comply with accessibility standards to provide equal access to all users.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the pricing features are developed, WHEN tested for accessibility, THEN they should meet WCAG 2.1 AA standards.

description: Migrate from flat monthly pricing to a consumption-based pricing model where customers pay per metric ingested and per dashboard query. This requires a metering pipeline that tracks usage in real time, a rating engine to apply pricing rules, and integration with Stripe for invoicing.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the new billing engine is implemented, WHEN a customer queries their usage, THEN the system should accurately reflect their usage and calculate the corresponding charges.

description: Develop an in-app pricing calculator that estimates monthly costs based on current usage patterns, and a predictive cost dashboard showing projected spend for the next billing cycle.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a customer inputs their usage data, WHEN they use the pricing calculator, THEN the system should display an accurate estimated cost for the next billing cycle.

description: Create configurable spending alerts (50%, 75%, 90%, 100% of budget) and optional hard spending caps that pause non-critical data ingestion when exceeded, ensuring graceful degradation without data loss.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a customer sets a spending cap, WHEN their usage exceeds this cap, THEN the system should pause non-critical data ingestion and notify the customer.

story_title: Implement Price Lock for Existing Customers
description: Develop a grandfathering system that tracks customer cohorts, applies correct pricing tiers, and automatically transitions customers after the lock period with 60-day advance notice.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a customer is grandfathered, WHEN the 12-month period is nearing its end, THEN the system should notify the customer 60 days in advance of their pricing change.

story_title: Implement Monitoring and Alerting for Billing System
description: Set up monitoring and alerting for the billing system to ensure accurate tracking of usage and billing events, including error handling and reporting.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the monitoring system is in place, WHEN a billing error occurs, THEN the system should alert the team immediately.

description: Develop comprehensive documentation outlining the new pricing model, including FAQs, user guides, and support resources to assist customers during the transition.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the documentation is published, WHEN a customer accesses the pricing section, THEN they should find clear and helpful information regarding the new pricing model.

description: Create a model that identifies which customer segments will see cost increases vs. decreases under the new pricing, flagging accounts where projected spend increases >30% for proactive account management outreach.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the churn risk model is implemented, WHEN a customer's projected spend increases by more than 30%, THEN the system should flag this account for outreach.

description: Run an experiment to analyze customer sensitivity to pricing changes by offering different pricing tiers to select customer segments and measuring churn and engagement.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the pricing sensitivity analysis is conducted, WHEN customers are offered different pricing tiers, THEN the system should track churn and engagement metrics accurately.

description: Implement a mechanism for collecting user feedback on the new pricing model, including surveys and feedback forms to gauge customer sentiment and areas for improvement.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the feedback collection mechanism is implemented, WHEN customers provide feedback, THEN the system should record and categorize their responses accurately.
